title: Lead Investment Banker at Manappuram Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Manappuram Finance
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
